claims.summary: Connection experience cannot be represented faithfully by one categorical string.
claims.disposition: Verified as a compatibility-view limitation, while current typed numeric cadence, freshness, first-valid, and entropy fields preserve the underlying dimensions.

claims.summary: Cadence clarity and semantic-content persistence must remain separately observable.
claims.disposition: Verified in current telemetry fields and the clear-cadence-with-residue regression.

claims.summary: Reconnects should reset connection-epoch perception without erasing durable compatibility.
claims.disposition: Verified by reconnect reset and legacy-snapshot tests.

claims.summary: A structured PerceptionMap should replace or accompany the compatibility string.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded additive fixture comparison; current numeric fields already prevent the string from becoming sole evidence, and no live report surface was changed here.
